LAW AND MOTION 301, MAR-20-2026 RE: MOTION TO STAY ACTION PENDING CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION. NOT ARGUED/CONTESTED. THE MATTER IS DISCUSSED. AT CONCLUSION OF DISCUSSION, THE COURT ADOPTS A MODIFIED TENTATIVE RULING, AS DISCUSSED ON THE RECORD, AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO FOR AN ORDER TO STAY ACTION PENDING CONTRACTUAL MEDIATION AND ARBITRATION IS GRANTED. AN ORDER IS EXECUTED IN OPEN COURT. SEE MINI MINUTES OR THE SCANNED ORDER FOR COMPLETE RULING. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. CLERK: ROBERT WOODS. NOT REPORTED. (301/CVA)

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-13-2026 Continued To Nov-04-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Motion To Stay Action Pending Contractual Arbitration
Off Calendar Mar-20-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF KARMIN GUZDER'S, AS TRUSTEE OF THE KARMIN JAL GUZDER TRUST DATED NOVEMBER 2, 2012, Motion To Stay Action Pending Contractual Arbitration.

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Anthony D. Giles, Esq., Law Office of, (415) 839-2099, for Plaintiff.
Stephen B. Welch, Esq., of Lewis Brisbois Bisgaard & Smith, (925) 357-3326, for Defendant.

Not argued/Contested. The court and counsel discuss counsel's request to modify it's tentative ruling as stipulated by counsel. The court states the language that it intends to include which counsel agrees to. Accordingly, the court adopts its modified tentative ruling as follows: Plaintiff's motion to for an order to stay action pending contractual mediation and arbitration is granted. The stay of the action shall be for all purposes, but notwithstanding the stay defendant Joshua Lee Roofener dba Beyond Horizon Construction shall be permitted to file and serve a responsive pleading to the complaint and a cross-complaint for indemnity against cross-defendants. This order is without prejudice to any request by newly entering parties to lift the stay.

An order is executed in open court.

Judge: Christine Van Aken. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported. (301/CVA)
